action.reasoning: Observation: Starting at iteration 0 with no workspace or history. Pretrained MetricGAN+ model available via speechbrain (task package, cached at /opt/pretrained_models). Analysis: MetricGAN+ is designed for speech enhancement and directly optimizes perceptual metrics like PESQ on VoiceBank+DEMAND-like data; strong baseline to validate pipeline, measure time, and get initial score before any training. Must test loading (network disabled so rely on local cache), usage for batch inference, and PESQ on val set. Decision: Write test_enhance.py to load model, enhance subset of val_noisy (50 samples for speed), compute avg PESQ vs val_clean, report timing. Copy pretrained to workspace for self-contained checkpoint. Follow up by creating minimal train.py (copies pretrained to ckpt) + full predict.py, then submit_eval for baseline.
